name: devrunway
description: Modular SDLC plugin for any tech stack. Pick your tools, get tailored coding standards, MCP wiring, sub-agent context management, 35+ safety/quality hooks, and the full SDLC workflow — brainstorm to production.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub fine-grained Personal Access Token. Required scopes: Contents (read), Issues (read/write), Pull Requests (read/write), Metadata (read).

FIGMA_TOKEN.description: Figma Personal Access Token (from Figma → Settings → Personal Access Tokens). Used for reading design files and components.

JIRA_BASE_URL.description: Jira Cloud base URL (e.g. https://yourorg.atlassian.net). Required if project-management=jira.

JIRA_EMAIL.description: Jira account email. Required if project-management=jira.

JIRA_API_TOKEN.description: Jira API token (Atlassian → Account → Security → API tokens). Required if project-management=jira.

GITLAB_TOKEN.description: GitLab Personal Access Token. Required scopes: api, read_repository. Required if project-management=gitlab or source-control=gitlab.

GITLAB_API_URL.description: GitLab API URL (default https://gitlab.com/api/v4 for SaaS; set to self-hosted instance otherwise).

LINEAR_API_KEY.description: Linear API key (Linear → Settings → API → Personal API keys). Required if project-management=linear.

CONFLUENCE_BASE_URL.description: Confluence Cloud base URL (e.g. https://yourorg.atlassian.net/wiki). Required if documents=confluence.

CONFLUENCE_EMAIL.description: Atlassian account email. Required if documents=confluence.

CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN.description: Confluence API token (Atlassian → Account → Security → API tokens). Required if documents=confluence.

NOTION_API_KEY.description: Notion internal integration token (Notion → Settings → Integrations → New integration). Required if documents=notion.
